creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On 07/03/11 18:47, Steve Wills wrote:
> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> Hash: SHA1
>
> I'm not sure this is necessary. The PORTREVISION bumps of the dependent
> ports should take care of this. If you run portmaster -a or portupgrade
> - -a, everything should be upgraded as necessary. This also doesn't seem
> to meet the criteria set in the Porters Handbook for an UPDATING entry:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/moved-and-updating-files.html
>
> However, if it becomes enough of a problem for users, I will add an
> entry to UPDATING. A proposed entry is attached.
>
> Steve
> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNATURE-----
> Version: GnuPG v2.0.17 (FreeBSD)
>
> iQEcBAEBAgAGBQJOEJ0GAAoJEPXPYrMgexuh2ugH/20j98wgtwbvvabKCCt4egew

For devel/anjuta, the ports in question to be rebuild are

devel/devhelp
www/webkit-gtk2

This is for devel/devhelp dependend on what plugin one selects.
